parts.title: Question-Response
parts.directions: Select the best response to each question.

groups.title: Question-Response 1
groups.transcript: Where should I place these invoices for North Harbor? On Daniel Cho's desk. For about twenty minutes. Because the printer is new.

groups.title: Question-Response 2
groups.transcript: Didn't Ms. Patel approve the travel request yesterday? Yes, she signed it before lunch. At the airport gate. A blue folder.

choices.text: Yes, she signed it before lunch.

groups.title: Question-Response 3
groups.transcript: When will the shuttle leave for Harborview Convention Center? At 8:30 this morning. By the side entrance. With two guests.

groups.title: Question-Response 4
groups.transcript: Who is updating the RouteBoard training guide? The IT coordinator is. Near the reception desk. Because it was delayed.

groups.title: Question-Response 5
groups.transcript: Could you send me the revised budget by noon? Certainly, I have almost finished it. No, the meeting room is upstairs. I ordered soup instead.

choices.text: Certainly, I have almost finished it.
No, the meeting room is upstairs.

groups.title: Question-Response 6
groups.transcript: Why was the front lobby closed this morning? It was being repainted. At the main branch. Quite a few visitors.

groups.title: Question-Response 7
groups.transcript: How often does the warehouse team inspect the loading dock? Twice a week. By barcode scanner. At dock number nine.

groups.title: Question-Response 8
groups.transcript: Would you rather meet on Thursday or Friday? Friday works better for me. No, I have not read it. It is beside the elevator.

choices.text: No, I have not read it.

groups.title: Question-Response 9
groups.transcript: Can I reserve a table at Sunset Bistro for six people? Of course, for what time? The soup was delicious. Near the parking lot.

groups.title: Question-Response 10
groups.transcript: What time does the bookstore in West Harbor open? At nine o'clock. For the history section. With my business card.

groups.title: Question-Response 11
groups.transcript: Haven't the samples from Blue Peak Supplies arrived yet? No, they are scheduled for tomorrow. In a locked cabinet. To the design studio.

choices.text: No, they are scheduled for tomorrow.

groups.title: Question-Response 12
groups.transcript: Which report should I print for the board meeting? The monthly sales summary. On recycled paper. Beside the projector.

groups.title: Question-Response 13
groups.transcript: Who's going to welcome the guests from Singapore? The reception manager will. A twenty-minute drive. At the side entrance.

groups.title: Question-Response 14
groups.transcript: Didn't you say the seminar was free? Yes, registration is free. The seminar room is large. By the train station.

groups.title: Question-Response 15
groups.transcript: Why don't we order extra chairs before the event starts? That's a good idea. About three feet wide. Because the lights were bright.

groups.title: Question-Response 16
groups.transcript: How many volunteers signed up for the Harbor Career Expo? A little over forty. By using the back entrance. Yes, in the lobby.

groups.title: Question-Response 17
groups.transcript: Could you remind me to call the repair company? Sure, I'll send you a message. The phone is on the counter. At half past three.

choices.text: Sure, I'll send you a message.
The phone is on the counter.

groups.title: Question-Response 18
groups.transcript: Where can I find the visitor badges? In the drawer beside the copier. For the annual conference. About twelve dollars.

choices.text: In the drawer beside the copier.

groups.title: Question-Response 19
groups.transcript: When is the article for Urban Trade Review due? By next Monday afternoon. It's about local startups. On the third floor.

groups.title: Question-Response 20
groups.transcript: Who approved the final layout for the brochure? Olivia Reed did. A stack of blue folders. During the lunch break.

groups.title: Question-Response 21
groups.transcript: Would it be possible to postpone the orientation? Yes, we can move it to next week. In the employee lounge. A welcome packet.

choices.text: Yes, we can move it to next week.

groups.title: Question-Response 22
groups.transcript: Why is the break room so crowded today? A food-tasting event is taking place. The lights were replaced. At the side counter.

choices.text: A food-tasting event is taking place.

groups.title: Question-Response 23
groups.transcript: How should I label the cartons for Dock 8 warehouse? Use the red destination stickers. On a metal shelf. By the freight elevator.

groups.title: Question-Response 24
groups.transcript: Didn't the customer ask for a digital receipt? That's right, I'll email it now. A shorter line today. The payment terminal.

choices.text: That's right, I'll email it now.

groups.title: Question-Response 25
groups.transcript: Which entrance should our guests use tomorrow? The one facing Maple Street. At ten o'clock sharp. Because the sign was removed.

parts.title: Conversations
parts.directions: Select the best response to each question.

groups.title: Meeting room update
groups.transcript:
Woman: Hi, Ms. Patel. The training room on the third floor is being repainted.
Man: Then let's move tomorrow's orientation to Conference Room B on the first floor.
Woman: No problem. I'll change the sign in the lobby and email the new room number to the interns.

questions.prompt: What are the speakers mainly discussing?
Where will the orientation be held?
What will the woman do next?

groups.title: Delivery timetable
groups.transcript:
Man: The airport run is delayed again because one of the vans needs maintenance.
Woman: Should we move those boxes to the two-fifteen harbor route instead?
Man: Yes. Please update the board and call the driver so he knows to collect them at dock three.

questions.prompt: What problem do the speakers mention?
According to the graphic, which route is delayed?
What does the man ask the woman to do?

groups.title: Gate change at the airport
groups.transcript:
Woman: Excuse me, is this the line for Flight 482 to Osaka?
Man: It was, but the flight was moved to Gate 12 after the delay.
Woman: Thanks. I'll send a quick message to my colleague before I head over there.

questions.prompt: Where most likely are the speakers?
What does the man say about the flight?
What will the woman do next?

groups.title: Cafe promotion review
groups.transcript:
Man: The buy-one-get-one lunch coupon brought in more customers than the dinner offer.
Woman: I can see that from the numbers. Wednesday was especially strong.
Man: Let's keep the lunch promotion for one more week and redesign the dinner poster.

questions.prompt: What are the speakers analyzing?
According to the graphic, when were the most lunch coupons used?
What does the man suggest?

groups.title: Apartment maintenance
groups.transcript:
Woman: The heater in apartment 4B is making a loud clicking sound.
Man: I can stop by after lunch to take a look at it.
Woman: Great. I'll let the tenant know that you'll need access around one-thirty.

questions.prompt: What problem does the woman mention?
When will the man visit apartment 4B?
What will the woman do?

groups.title: Workshop registration
groups.transcript:
Man: I noticed your name is missing from the spreadsheet for Friday's design workshop.
Woman: That's because I was waiting to confirm whether my train arrives on time.
Man: Registration closes tonight, so I'll reserve a seat for you now and you can update your travel details later.

questions.prompt: Why is the woman's name missing from the spreadsheet?

choices.text: She has not confirmed her travel

questions.prompt: What does the man say about registration?

choices.text: It must be done in person

questions.prompt: What will the man do?

groups.title: Supply cabinet inventory
groups.transcript:
Woman: We're almost out of toner again.
Man: You're right. The spreadsheet says we should reorder whenever the number drops below four.
Woman: I'll add toner to today's purchase request and leave the other items alone for now.

questions.prompt: What are the speakers discussing?
According to the graphic, which item is below the reorder level?
What will the woman do?

groups.title: Library program planning
groups.transcript:
Man: The author visit is getting more registrations than our usual book club night.
Woman: Then we should move it from the reading room to the auditorium.
Man: Good idea. I'll also ask the volunteers to set up extra chairs before people arrive.

questions.prompt: What event are the speakers discussing?
Why do the speakers want to change rooms?
What will the man ask volunteers to do?

groups.title: Hotel reservation correction
groups.transcript:
Woman: I booked the client for two nights, but her train won't arrive until late on Wednesday.
Man: In that case, shorten the reservation by one night and keep the breakfast package.
Woman: All right. I'll update the booking before I send the confirmation email.

questions.prompt: What mistake did the woman make?

choices.text: She selected the wrong meal plan

questions.prompt: What does the man tell the woman to keep?
What will the woman do next?

groups.title: Brochure approval
groups.transcript:
Man: I like the updated layout, especially the photo on the front cover.
Woman: Thanks. I still need your signature before the printer can begin.
Man: I'll sign it now, and then please send the final file to the print shop before five o'clock.

questions.prompt: What item are the speakers discussing?
What does the woman need from the man?
What does the man ask the woman to do?

choices.text: Send the file to the printer

groups.title: Bus route adjustment
groups.transcript:
Woman: The evening shuttle is too early for employees who finish at five-thirty.
Man: Then let's move the first evening pickup to five-fifty instead of five-twenty.
Woman: Good. I'll post the revised schedule near the cafeteria and in the staff app.

questions.prompt: What service are the speakers talking about?
According to the graphic, what time does the evening shuttle currently leave Central Station?
What will the woman do next?

groups.title: Software rollout
groups.transcript:
Man: The sales team finished testing the new dashboard in RouteBoard.
Woman: Great. Did they mention any issues?
Man: Only one. They want the export button moved closer to the report filters, so I've asked the developer to make that change before tomorrow morning.

questions.prompt: What project are the speakers discussing?
What change was requested?
What has the man already done?

choices.text: Asked a developer to make a change

groups.title: Museum tour booking
groups.transcript:
Woman: We would like to book a guided tour for thirty students next Friday.
Man: That should be fine, but the ten o'clock slot is full.
Woman: In that case, please reserve the noon tour and send the payment instructions to my email.

questions.prompt: Why is the woman calling?

choices.text: To order lunch for a group

questions.prompt: What does the man say about the ten o'clock slot?
What does the woman ask the man to do?

parts.title: Talks
parts.directions: Select the best response to each question.

groups.title: Store announcement
groups.transcript:
Good morning, shoppers. The escalator beside the home-goods section is temporarily out of service while technicians complete a safety inspection.
If you need to reach the second floor, please use the elevator near the customer service desk instead.
We expect the escalator to reopen before noon. Thank you for your patience.

questions.prompt: Where would this announcement most likely be heard?
Why is the escalator unavailable?
What are customers asked to use instead?

groups.title: Tour schedule
groups.transcript:
Hello, Ms. Turner. I have finalized your travel itinerary for this week's visit to our Midwest office.
As shown in the schedule, we moved the shareholder presentation to Thursday afternoon so you can meet the Chicago staff first.
If you want to add time for an investor lunch, Tuesday would be the best day.

questions.prompt: What is the speaker mainly talking about?
According to the graphic, when will the shareholder presentation take place?
What does the speaker suggest adding on Tuesday?

groups.title: Voice mail from a repair company
groups.transcript:
Hello, this is Martin from Swift Repair Services.
I'm calling to confirm that our technician will arrive at your office between ten and eleven tomorrow morning to service the copy machine on the second floor.
Please make sure the area around the machine is clear so we can begin work right away.

questions.prompt: Who most likely is the speaker?
What will happen tomorrow morning?
What does the speaker ask the listener to do?

choices.text: Clear the area near the machine

groups.title: Team meeting intro
groups.transcript:
Thanks for joining this week's team meeting.
Before we review the new client accounts, I want to congratulate everyone for reaching our quarterly response-time goal.
After the meeting, please stop by the break room to pick up your updated ID badges from the front table.

questions.prompt: What is the purpose of the talk?
What achievement does the speaker mention?
What are listeners asked to pick up?

groups.title: Flight notice
groups.transcript:
Attention, passengers. Flight 431 to Osaka has been delayed due to severe weather in the destination area.
At this time, we expect boarding to begin forty minutes later than planned.
Passengers may collect a meal voucher at the customer service counter near Gate C.

questions.prompt: What is causing the delay?
According to the graphic, which flight is currently boarding?
What can delayed passengers receive?

groups.title: Office tour greeting
groups.transcript:
Welcome to North Harbor Logistics. My name is Jenna, and I will be showing you around our headquarters this afternoon.
We'll begin in the design studio on the fourth floor, and then we'll visit the customer support area.
Please keep your visitor badge visible at all times while you are in the building.

questions.prompt: Who are the listeners?
Where will the tour begin?
What are listeners asked to do?

groups.title: Radio advertisement
groups.transcript:
This weekend only, stop by Sunset Bistro for our neighborhood brunch festival.
Local musicians will perform on the patio from ten until two, and every table will receive a complimentary dessert sampler.
Reservations are recommended, so visit our website today to choose your seating time.

questions.prompt: What is being advertised?
What will customers receive?
What are listeners encouraged to do?

groups.title: Seminar schedule
groups.transcript:
Good afternoon, everyone. The analytics seminar will begin at eleven o'clock in Room B18 as listed on the schedule.
If you registered for leadership instead, please note that it is still being held in Room A12.
Printed workbooks are available on the table near the west entrance.

questions.prompt: What event are the listeners attending?
According to the graphic, where will the analytics seminar be held?
What can listeners pick up near the west entrance?

groups.title: Website maintenance notice
groups.transcript:
This is a message for all employees.
The internal website will be unavailable from six until seven this evening while the IT team installs a security update.
During that time, please save urgent requests in a document and upload them after service has been restored.

questions.prompt: What will happen this evening?
Why will the website be unavailable?

choices.text: A security update is being installed

questions.prompt: What are employees asked to do?

choices.text: Save urgent requests for later upload

groups.title: Community lecture
groups.transcript:
Thank you for coming to tonight's lecture on urban garden design.
The presentation will begin in five minutes, and afterward our guest speaker will answer questions from the audience.
If you have not already done so, please silence your mobile phone before the program starts.

questions.prompt: What type of event is about to begin?
When will attendees be able to ask questions?
What are listeners asked to do?

parts.title: Incomplete Sentences
parts.directions: Select the best answer to complete the sentence.

questions.prompt: All visitors are required to sign in at the front desk before ____ the warehouse.
The finance team will review the proposal again ____ the revised figures arrive.
Please place the fragile items in the blue container so they can be handled ____.
Ms. Patel asked the assistants to prepare name badges for everyone ____ the workshop.
The printer in the lobby is unavailable today, so employees should use the machine on the ____ floor.
Because the supplier lowered its prices, the store was able to offer a more ____ membership package.
No later than Friday, each department must submit a list of items it plans to ____ next quarter.
The marketing report was incomplete because one chart had been left ____ the final file.
Employees who would like a parking permit should complete the online form and upload a copy of their vehicle ____.
The museum's lecture series has become so popular that tickets often sell out several days in ____.
Customers may return unopened products within ten days, ____ they include the original receipt.
The new shelves are wider than the old ones, so the storage room can now hold ____ cartons.
To reduce wait times, the reception desk now uses a ticket system that assigns guests a queue number ____.
The article in Urban Trade Review was written by an architect ____ specializes in small-office design.
Please be aware that all conference calls are recorded for training ____ quality-control purposes.
Our branch manager requested a summary of this month's returns, including the reasons customers gave for each ____.
The afternoon shuttle was delayed by road construction, ____ most passengers still arrived before the meeting began.
A detailed seating chart will be emailed to attendees once the registration deadline has ____.
The assistant discovered that one of the shipment labels had the street number printed ____.
Since the office pantry is being cleaned, staff members are asked to keep all snacks at their desks until the work is ____.
The training video explains how the new scanner works and also gives tips on how to keep it in good ____.
Candidates will be contacted individually if the interview panel needs ____ information before making a decision.
Because demand for the new Aster speaker exceeded expectations, the purchasing team placed another order ____.
The editorial board praised the report for being concise, accurate, and easy to ____.
Please keep your visitor badge visible ____ you are inside the research facility.
The renovation schedule has changed slightly, but the grand reopening is still expected to happen ____ June.
At the end of each shift, employees must check that the lights have been turned off and the doors are securely ____.
The bus to the convention center runs every thirty minutes, making it the most ____ option for commuters.
The customer service team responded quickly to the complaint and offered a refund, ____ a replacement item.
Before the article is published, the copy editor will review it for grammar, style, and factual ____.

parts.title: Text Completion
parts.directions: Read the text and select the best answer for each blank.

passages.label: Text
passages.title: Expo registration email
passages.content:
Thank you for registering for the Harbor Career Expo. Your booth assignment will be emailed to you by Friday.

To make the setup process more efficient, vendors are asked to arrive [1] than 8:30 A.M. on the first day of the event.
Each booth will already include one table and two chairs, but electrical service must be [2] in advance.
[3]
If you have any questions before the showcase opens, please contact our events office by phone or email.

questions.prompt: At [1], choose the best word or phrase.
At [2], choose the best word or phrase.
At [3], choose the best sentence.

choices.text: Parking coupons can be purchased at the loading gate.
The showcase ended with a fireworks display last year.
Booth walls are painted every two weeks.

questions.prompt: At [4], choose the best word or phrase to complete the idea of the passage.
questions.support_text: Which word best describes the assignment information that will be sent by Friday?

passages.label: Text
passages.title: Office maintenance notice
passages.content:
Beginning next Monday, the first-floor pantry will close for three days while new cabinets are installed.

During the renovation, employees should use the temporary refreshment area on the fourth floor.
The facilities team will place signs near the elevators so the alternate location can be found [1].
Staff members are also reminded to remove any personal items from the pantry shelves before work begins; [2], those items may be stored in labeled boxes by the maintenance crew.
[3]
We appreciate your patience and expect the pantry to reopen by Thursday afternoon with additional seating and brighter lighting.

questions.prompt: At [1], choose the best word or phrase.
At [2], choose the best word or phrase.
At [3], choose the best sentence.

choices.text: Coffee beans from local farms will be sold in the lobby.
Please note that the microwave will remain available in Room 407.
Some employees prefer tea to coffee in the afternoon.
The pantry shelves were delivered last winter.

questions.prompt: What is the notice mainly about?

passages.label: Text
passages.title: Magazine article excerpt
passages.content:
The editors of Urban Trade Review recently visited three neighborhood shops that have successfully expanded their businesses without changing their local character.

One owner explained that the key to growth is listening carefully to returning customers and adjusting services [1].
Another business improved foot traffic by redesigning its window displays and updating product signs more [2].
[3]
Their experiences suggest that small companies can increase revenue while still preserving the personal service that first attracted loyal customers.

questions.prompt: At [1], choose the best word or phrase.
At [2], choose the best word or phrase.
At [3], choose the best sentence.

choices.text: Both owners also said that clear communication with staff made daily operations smoother.
The city zoo closes one hour earlier in winter.
A local bakery added six new parking spaces last month.
Retail taxes are calculated differently in coastal regions.

questions.prompt: What do the owners' experiences suggest?

choices.text: Growth always requires moving to a larger city.
Personal service can support business growth.
Advertising costs should be avoided entirely.

passages.label: Text
passages.title: Supplier letter
passages.content:
Dear Purchasing Team,

We are writing to inform you that shipments from Blue Peak Supplies will arrive one day later than usual for the next two weeks.
A temporary highway closure near our main distribution center has slowed outbound traffic [1].
To reduce inconvenience, we will email a revised delivery estimate each morning and provide free upgrades to our [2] service for urgent orders.
[3]
Thank you for your understanding as we work to return to our normal schedule.

questions.prompt: At [1], choose the best word or phrase.
At [2], choose the best word or phrase.
At [3], choose the best sentence.

choices.text: Our customer support team will remain available to answer order-status questions.
Most of our drivers prefer traveling before sunrise in summer.
The new catalog includes fewer pages than last year's edition.
This letter should be printed on blue paper.

questions.prompt: Why are shipments delayed?

parts.title: Reading Comprehension
parts.directions: Read the following text or set of texts and answer the questions.

passages.label: Advertisement
passages.title: Summer Auto Supply Service Special
passages.content:
Summer Auto Supply
Service Special

$29.95

Service includes:
- Conventional oil change
- Premium oil filter change
- Complimentary car inspection

This offer is valid only at our Smithville and Parkertown locations through August 31.
Customers must present this coupon at the time of service. Limit one coupon per customer.

questions.prompt: What service is NOT included with the special?
What is indicated about the coupon?

choices.text: It can be used at all locations.
It is available only to first-time customers.
It must be used before the end of August.
It can be used multiple times.

passages.label: Email
passages.title: Lecture update
passages.content:
To: Staff and guests
Subject: Friday evening lecture

Please note that this week's public lecture on sustainable packaging will begin at 6:00 P.M. in Hall B.
Doors will open at 5:30, and attendees may ask questions after the presentation.
A light reception will be held in the lobby immediately afterward.

questions.prompt: What time will the lecture begin?
The lecture will take place at 6:00 P.M., ______ which attendees may ask questions.

passages.label: Notice
passages.title: Staff parking reminder
passages.content:
Beginning May 2, the east parking lot will be reserved for delivery vehicles during building renovations.
Employees should park in the south lot and use the covered walkway near Entrance C.
Temporary signs will be posted along the road to direct incoming traffic.

questions.prompt: Why is the east parking lot being reserved?
What are employees advised to do?

passages.label: Article
passages.title: Neighborhood market grows with local makers
passages.content:
When West Harbor Market first opened, it sold only packaged foods and household basics.
Over the last three years, however, manager Lena Brooks has invited local artists and small food producers to rent weekend stalls.
The change has drawn more foot traffic, and nearby cafes now stay open later on market days.
Brooks says the next step is to add monthly evening events during the summer.

questions.prompt: What is the article mainly about?
What has increased because of the market's change?
What does Brooks plan to do next?

passages.label: Text messages
passages.title: Delivery coordination
passages.content:
9:12 A.M. - Mia: The courier for the display panels is here, but the loading elevator is busy.
9:13 A.M. - Jonah: Ask the driver to wait ten minutes. The maintenance crew is finishing up.
9:17 A.M. - Mia: Okay. Should I still send the panels to Booth 14 afterward?
9:18 A.M. - Jonah: Yes, and leave the spare stand at the registration desk.

questions.prompt: Why is the courier waiting?
Where should the panels be sent?
What should happen to the spare stand?

choices.text: It should be left at the registration desk
It should be sold at the booth

passages.label: Memo
passages.title: Updated onboarding packet
passages.content:
To: Department coordinators
From: Olivia Reed

We have revised the onboarding packet for new employees to include clearer instructions for remote-access setup.
Please discard any printed copies dated before March and replace them with the version attached to this memo.
Coordinators who need extra printed sets should notify the HR desk by Thursday afternoon.

questions.prompt: What has been revised?
Which copies should be discarded?
By when should requests for more printed sets be sent?

passages.label: Web notice
passages.title: Community workshop registration
passages.content:
Registration is now open for the Community Makers Workshop on Saturday, June 8.
Morning sessions will focus on design planning, and afternoon sessions will feature hands-on demonstrations with local instructors.
Participants who register by May 20 will receive a digital materials guide before the event.
Seating is limited, so early registration is recommended.

questions.prompt: What is being announced?
What will afternoon sessions include?
What do early registrants receive?

passages.label: Email 1
passages.title: Question about seminar room
passages.content:
To: events@North Harbor.com
From: Priya N.

Hello,
My team is registered for next Tuesday's analytics seminar. Our confirmation message lists Room 214,
but the event page still shows Room 302. Could you confirm which room is correct?
Thank you,
Priya

passages.label: Email 2
passages.title: Reply
passages.content:
To: Priya N.
From: Event Services

Hello Priya,
Thanks for catching that. The seminar was moved to Room 214 after we needed the larger space in Room 302 for another program.
We have updated the event page, and an automatic reminder will go out to all attendees this afternoon.
Best,
Event Services

questions.prompt: Why did Priya write the first email?
What problem does Event Services mention?
Why was the seminar moved to Room 214?

choices.text: Room 302 is needed for another program
The speaker requested a smaller room

questions.prompt: What will happen this afternoon?

choices.text: An automatic reminder will be sent
The event page will be removed

questions.prompt: What is suggested about Priya?

passages.label: Letter
passages.title: Supplier notice
passages.content:
Dear Purchasing Office,

Thank you for your recent order of lobby furniture. We have packed all requested items and scheduled delivery for May 6.
Please note that the floor lamp you selected is temporarily unavailable in walnut finish, so we have placed the oak version on hold for you instead.
If you prefer to wait for the walnut finish, contact us by Friday and we will adjust the shipment.
Sincerely,
FurnishRight

passages.label: Invoice
passages.title: Order summary
passages.content:
FurnishRight
Invoice 4472

2 lounge chairs .......... $540
1 side table ............. $135
1 floor lamp (oak) ....... $120
Delivery charge .......... $45
Total due ................ $840
Delivery date ............ May 6

questions.prompt: What item is currently unavailable in the requested finish?
What must the customer do to wait for the walnut finish?
According to the invoice, what is scheduled for May 6?
How much is the delivery charge?
What is indicated about the oak lamp?

choices.text: It replaces the original choice for now
It is more expensive than the chairs

passages.label: Notice
passages.title: Community shuttle service
passages.content:
Beginning next week, the community shuttle will stop at the library only on Tuesdays and Thursdays.
Monday service will end because of low ridership, but an additional Friday trip will be added for the farmers' market.
Riders should check the updated stop times posted in the lobby before planning their trips.

passages.label: Press release
passages.title: New community studio
passages.content:
North Harbor Logistics announced today that it will open a public innovation studio inside the restored Harbor Mill building this summer.
The studio will host maker classes, weekend demonstrations, and talks by local entrepreneurs.
Company representatives said the goal is to create a place where students, residents, and small businesses can work together on practical projects.

passages.label: Email
passages.title: Opening event coordination
passages.content:
To: Daniel Cho
Subject: Opening event speakers

Please confirm whether the city arts director can still give the welcome remarks at 10:00 A.M.
If not, ask the workshop lead to move the first demonstration fifteen minutes earlier so the rest of the agenda stays on track.
Also, remember to reserve seats in the front row for community partners.

passages.label: Agenda
passages.title: Opening day
passages.content:

10:00 A.M. Welcome remarks
10:30 A.M. Demo session 1
11:15 A.M. Partner tour
12:00 P.M. Networking lunch

passages.label: Advertisement
passages.title: Weekend maker market
passages.content:
Visit the Weekend Maker Market at Harborview Convention Center to explore handcrafted goods, small-batch foods, and live demonstrations from regional creators.
The market runs every Saturday in June from 9:00 A.M. to 3:00 P.M.
Visitors who attend before noon can join a free mini-workshop while space remains available.

passages.content:
Weekend Maker Market
Free Mini-Workshop Voucher

Valid for one beginner session only.
Present this voucher at the workshop desk before 11:45 A.M.
Limit one voucher per visitor.

passages.label: FAQ
passages.title: Visitor information
passages.content:
Q: Is parking available?
A: Yes, paid parking is available in Garage B.

Q: Are children allowed in the mini-workshops?
A: Yes, but children under twelve must attend with an adult.

Q: Can I bring my own materials?
A: No. All beginner workshops provide the necessary supplies.

parts.title: Incomplete Sentences
parts.directions: Select the best answer to complete the sentence.

questions.prompt: All visitors are required to sign in at the front desk before ____ the warehouse.
The finance team will review the proposal again ____ the revised figures arrive.
Please place the fragile items in the blue container so they can be handled ____.
Mr. Gomez asked the assistants to prepare name badges for everyone ____ the workshop.
The printer in the lobby is unavailable today, so employees should use the machine on the ____ floor.
Because the supplier lowered its prices, the store was able to offer a more ____ membership package.
No later than Friday, each department must submit a list of items it plans to ____ next quarter.
The marketing report was incomplete because one chart had been left ____ the final file.
Employees who would like a parking permit should complete the online form and upload a copy of their vehicle ____.
The museum's lecture series has become so popular that tickets often sell out several days in ____.
Customers may return unopened products within ten days, ____ they include the original receipt.
The new shelves are wider than the old ones, so the storage room can now hold ____ cartons.
To reduce wait times, the reception desk now uses a ticket system that assigns guests a queue number ____.
The article in Retail Leader Monthly was written by an architect ____ specializes in small-office design.
Please be aware that all conference calls are recorded for training ____ quality-control purposes.
Our branch manager requested a summary of this month's returns, including the reasons customers gave for each ____.
The afternoon shuttle was delayed by road construction, ____ most passengers still arrived before the meeting began.
A detailed seating chart will be emailed to attendees once the registration deadline has ____.
The assistant discovered that one of the shipment labels had the street number printed ____.
Since the office pantry is being cleaned, staff members are asked to keep all snacks at their desks until the work is ____.
The training video explains how the new scanner works and also gives tips on how to keep it in good ____.
Candidates will be contacted individually if the interview panel needs ____ information before making a decision.
Because demand for the new Mira tablet stand exceeded expectations, the purchasing team placed another order ____.
The editorial board praised the report for being concise, accurate, and easy to ____.
Please keep your visitor badge visible ____ you are inside the research facility.
The renovation schedule has changed slightly, but the grand reopening is still expected to happen ____ June.
At the end of each shift, employees must check that the lights have been turned off and the doors are securely ____.
The bus to the convention center runs every thirty minutes, making it the most ____ option for commuters.
The customer service team responded quickly to the complaint and offered a refund, ____ a replacement item.
Before the article is published, the copy editor will review it for grammar, style, and factual ____.

parts.title: Text Completion

passages.label: Text
passages.title: Expo registration email
passages.content:
Thank you for registering for the City Business Showcase. Your booth assignment will be emailed to you by Friday.

To make the setup process more efficient, vendors are asked to arrive [1] than 8:30 A.M. on the first day of the event.
Each booth will already include one table and two chairs, but electrical service must be [2] in advance.
[3]
If you have any questions before the showcase opens, please contact our events office by phone or email.

questions.prompt: At [1], choose the best word or phrase.
At [2], choose the best word or phrase.
At [3], choose the best sentence.

choices.text: Parking coupons can be purchased at the loading gate.
The showcase ended with a fireworks display last year.
Booth walls are painted every two weeks.

questions.prompt: At [4], choose the best word or phrase to complete the idea of the passage.
questions.support_text: Which word best describes the assignment information that will be sent by Friday?

passages.label: Text
passages.title: Office maintenance notice
passages.content:
Beginning next Monday, the first-floor pantry will close for three days while new cabinets are installed.

During the renovation, employees should use the temporary refreshment area on the fourth floor.
The facilities team will place signs near the elevators so the alternate location can be found [1].
Staff members are also reminded to remove any personal items from the pantry shelves before work begins; [2], those items may be stored in labeled boxes by the maintenance crew.
[3]
We appreciate your patience and expect the pantry to reopen by Thursday afternoon with additional seating and brighter lighting.

questions.prompt: At [1], choose the best word or phrase.
At [2], choose the best word or phrase.
At [3], choose the best sentence.

choices.text: Coffee beans from local farms will be sold in the lobby.
Please note that the microwave will remain available in Room 407.
Some employees prefer tea to coffee in the afternoon.
The pantry shelves were delivered last winter.

questions.prompt: What is the notice mainly about?

passages.label: Text
passages.title: Magazine article excerpt
passages.content:
The editors of Retail Leader Monthly recently visited three neighborhood shops that have successfully expanded their businesses without changing their local character.

One owner explained that the key to growth is listening carefully to returning customers and adjusting services [1].
Another business improved foot traffic by redesigning its window displays and updating product signs more [2].
[3]
Their experiences suggest that small companies can increase revenue while still preserving the personal service that first attracted loyal customers.

questions.prompt: At [1], choose the best word or phrase.
At [2], choose the best word or phrase.
At [3], choose the best sentence.

choices.text: Both owners also said that clear communication with staff made daily operations smoother.
The city zoo closes one hour earlier in winter.
A local bakery added six new parking spaces last month.
Retail taxes are calculated differently in coastal regions.

questions.prompt: What do the owners' experiences suggest?

choices.text: Growth always requires moving to a larger city.
Personal service can support business growth.
Advertising costs should be avoided entirely.

passages.label: Text
passages.title: Supplier letter
passages.content:
Dear Purchasing Team,

We are writing to inform you that shipments from Clear Sky Office Goods will arrive one day later than usual for the next two weeks.
A temporary highway closure near our main distribution center has slowed outbound traffic [1].
To reduce inconvenience, we will email a revised delivery estimate each morning and provide free upgrades to our [2] service for urgent orders.
[3]
Thank you for your understanding as we work to return to our normal schedule.

questions.prompt: At [1], choose the best word or phrase.
At [2], choose the best word or phrase.
At [3], choose the best sentence.

choices.text: Our customer support team will remain available to answer order-status questions.
Most of our drivers prefer traveling before sunrise in summer.
The new catalog includes fewer pages than last year's edition.
This letter should be printed on blue paper.

questions.prompt: Why are shipments delayed?

passages.label: Article
passages.title: Neighborhood market grows with local makers
passages.content:
When West Harbor Market first opened, it sold only packaged foods and household basics.
Over the last three years, however, manager Lena Brooks has invited local artists and small food producers to rent weekend stalls.
The change has drawn more foot traffic, and nearby cafes now stay open later on market days.
Brooks says the next step is to add monthly evening events during the summer.

questions.prompt: What is the article mainly about?
What has increased because of the market's change?
What does Brooks plan to do next?

passages.title: Delivery coordination
passages.content:
9:12 A.M. - Mia: The courier for the display panels is here, but the loading elevator is busy.
9:13 A.M. - Jonah: Ask the driver to wait ten minutes. The maintenance crew is finishing up.
9:17 A.M. - Mia: Okay. Should I still send the panels to Booth 14 afterward?
9:18 A.M. - Jonah: Yes, and leave the spare stand at the registration desk.

passages.label: Memo
passages.title: Updated onboarding packet
passages.content:
To: Department coordinators
From: Marcus Bell

We have revised the onboarding packet for new employees to include clearer instructions for remote-access setup.
Please discard any printed copies dated before March and replace them with the version attached to this memo.
Coordinators who need extra printed sets should notify the HR desk by Thursday afternoon.

questions.prompt: What has been revised?
Which copies should be discarded?
By when should requests for more printed sets be sent?

passages.label: Web notice
passages.title: Community workshop registration
passages.content:
Registration is now open for the Community Makers Workshop on Saturday, June 8.
Morning sessions will focus on design planning, and afternoon sessions will feature hands-on demonstrations with local instructors.
Participants who register by May 20 will receive a digital materials guide before the event.
Seating is limited, so early registration is recommended.

questions.prompt: What is being announced?
What will afternoon sessions include?
What do early registrants receive?

passages.label: Email 1
passages.title: Question about seminar room
passages.content:
To: events@Summit Lane.com
From: Priya N.

Hello,
My team is registered for next Tuesday's analytics seminar. Our confirmation message lists Room 214,
but the event page still shows Room 302. Could you confirm which room is correct?
Thank you,
Priya

passages.label: Email 2
passages.title: Reply
passages.content:
To: Priya N.
From: Event Services

Hello Priya,
Thanks for catching that. The seminar was moved to Room 214 after we needed the larger space in Room 302 for another program.
We have updated the event page, and an automatic reminder will go out to all attendees this afternoon.
Best,
Event Services

questions.prompt: Why did Priya write the first email?
What problem does Event Services mention?
Why was the seminar moved to Room 214?

choices.text: Room 302 is needed for another program
The speaker requested a smaller room

questions.prompt: What will happen this afternoon?

choices.text: An automatic reminder will be sent
The event page will be removed

questions.prompt: What is suggested about Priya?

passages.label: Letter
passages.title: Supplier notice
passages.content:
Dear Purchasing Office,

Thank you for your recent order of lobby furniture. We have packed all requested items and scheduled delivery for May 6.
Please note that the floor lamp you selected is temporarily unavailable in walnut finish, so we have placed the oak version on hold for you instead.
If you prefer to wait for the walnut finish, contact us by Friday and we will adjust the shipment.
Sincerely,
FurnishRight

passages.content:

2 lounge chairs .......... $540
1 side table ............. $135
1 floor lamp (oak) ....... $120
Delivery charge .......... $45
Total due ................ $840
Delivery date ............ May 6

passages.label: Notice
passages.title: Community shuttle service
passages.content:
Beginning next week, the community shuttle will stop at the library only on Tuesdays and Thursdays.
Monday service will end because of low ridership, but an additional Friday trip will be added for the farmers' market.
Riders should check the updated stop times posted in the lobby before planning their trips.

questions.prompt: Why will Monday library service end?

choices.text: The library is closing on Mondays

questions.prompt: What new trip is being added?
According to the schedule, when does the Friday library stop occur?
What are riders advised to do?
What is likely true about Friday service?

choices.text: It is intended for market visitors

passages.label: Press release
passages.title: New community studio
passages.content:
Summit Lane Retail announced today that it will open a public innovation studio inside the restored Harbor Mill building this summer.
The studio will host maker classes, weekend demonstrations, and talks by local entrepreneurs.
Company representatives said the goal is to create a place where students, residents, and small businesses can work together on practical projects.

passages.label: Email
passages.title: Opening event coordination
passages.content:
To: Rina Park
Subject: Opening event speakers

Please confirm whether the city arts director can still give the welcome remarks at 10:00 A.M.
If not, ask the workshop lead to move the first demonstration fifteen minutes earlier so the rest of the agenda stays on track.
Also, remember to reserve seats in the front row for community partners.

11:15 A.M. Partner tour
12:00 P.M. Networking lunch

passages.label: Advertisement
passages.title: Weekend maker market
passages.content:
Visit the Weekend Maker Market at North Hall Exhibition Center to explore handcrafted goods, small-batch foods, and live demonstrations from regional creators.
The market runs every Saturday in June from 9:00 A.M. to 3:00 P.M.
Visitors who attend before noon can join a free mini-workshop while space remains available.

passages.label: Coupon
passages.title: Workshop voucher
passages.content:
Weekend Maker Market
Free Mini-Workshop Voucher

Valid for one beginner session only.
Present this voucher at the workshop desk before 11:45 A.M.
Limit one voucher per visitor.

passages.label: FAQ
passages.title: Visitor information
passages.content:
Q: Is parking available?
A: Yes, paid parking is available in Garage B.

Q: Are children allowed in the mini-workshops?
A: Yes, but children under twelve must attend with an adult.

Q: Can I bring my own materials?
A: No. All beginner workshops provide the necessary supplies.
